title: space_set: TOCTOU between space_exists and get_space_member_role
description: In space_set update and destroy, space_exists is called first (read), then get_space_member_role (read), then update_space_fully / delete_space (write). These three calls are not wrapped in a transaction. Trigger: Admin A is removed between the existence check and the role check; the role check returns Admin on a stale result from a prior query. This window is tiny but the fix is to fold the existence+role check into a single read transaction or to use FOR UPDATE semantics. Currently a race can allow a former admin to perform one last update/destroy before their removal is visible.
